rationale: The answer correctly identifies chapter 1 of Bang-E-Dara Part 1 and quotes the opening couplet verbatim ('What wondrous piety, for all to see, / He holds the entire world in enmity.') as confirmed in the corpus (paragraph p-5edbd3). However, the cited paragraph_id 'p-1-opening' is fabricated — it does not resolve via get_passage; the actual ID is p-5edbd3. Since the textual content is accurate but the paragraph_id is invented, citation_grounding is penalized to 1 and hallucination_avoidance to 2.
verifications_performed: Called read_chapter for work_slug=allama-iqbal-bang-e-dara-part-1-55b25c chapter_number=1 variant=translation — confirmed opening couplet matches the candidate quote verbatim
Called get_passage with paragraph_id='p-1-opening' — returned empty passages array, confirming the cited paragraph_id does not exist
Read translation.paragraphs.json directly — confirmed real opening paragraph has id='p-5edbd3' with text matching the quote
